title: Minecraft but Every Mob is a Chicken Jokey
description: Transforms most living mobs (e.g., zombies, cows, creepers) into chicken jockeys (also dragon jockey)
body:
# Chicken Rider Mod

Yo, Minecraft fans! Get ready for some wild fun with **Chicken Rider**, a mod I poured my heart into after watching Dream’s _Minecraft, But Every Mob Is A Chicken Jockey_ video. This mod turns your world into a hilarious chicken jokey mobs where mobs like zombies, creepers, and cows ride on chickens. And the best part is chicken ride _on top_ of the Ender Dragon, making every End fight look absolutely epic!

## What’s This Mod About?

*   **Chicken Jockeys Everywhere**: Zombies, skeletons, even pigs ride chickens, bossing them around like true jockeys. It’s like the vanilla chicken jockey vibe, but for almost every mob!
*   **Looks Awesome**: I made sure every rider sits perfectly on their chicken, with no awkward clipping, so it all feels polished.

 

*   **Minecraft**: 1.21
*   **Mods**:
    *   Fabric Loader (version 0.16.10 or higher).
    *   Fabric API 
*   **Java**: JDK 21 to keep things running smoothly.

## Where It Works?

*   **Server-Side** : Will work in fabric servers without needing it installed on their client. 
*   **Single-Player**: It works great in your solo worlds.

 

## Credit:

Huge thanks to Dream for the inspiration—his video made me want to code this funny idea. I hope you love playing it !<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/za47sfExK34" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
